description: Payments, lending, fraud detection, compliance, treasury, AP/AR, investments, reconciliation, billing, insurance, reporting and risk management

domains.description: Payment processing, authorization, routing, fraud detection and modern payment rails

intents.name: detect_fraud_transaction
intents.description: Evaluates a transaction for fraud indicators using ML models

intents.name: approve_payment
intents.description: Approves a payment request after validating all rules and limits

intents.name: route_payment
intents.description: Selects the optimal payment rail based on amount, currency, and destination

intents.name: retry_payment
intents.description: Retries a failed payment with alternate routing or provider

intents.name: optimize_payment_rail
intents.description: Recommends the best payment rail for cost and speed optimization

intents.name: detect_duplicate_transaction
intents.description: Identifies duplicate payment submissions within a time window

intents.name: flag_suspicious_transaction
intents.description: Flags transactions that match suspicious behavior patterns for review

intents.name: validate_transaction_limit
intents.description: Validates that a transaction amount is within permissible limits for the account

intents.name: authorize_card
intents.description: Authorizes a card transaction against issuer rules and available balance

intents.name: decline_transaction
intents.description: Declines a transaction with a reason code and recommended action

intents.name: process_refund
intents.description: Processes a refund request and initiates reversal to the originating payment method

intents.name: handle_chargeback
intents.description: Manages the chargeback process including evidence collection and dispute filing

intents.name: verify_upi
intents.description: Verifies a UPI VPA and validates the beneficiary before payment

intents.name: monitor_realtime_payment
intents.description: Monitors real-time payment flows for anomalies and compliance breaches

intents.name: cross_border_check
intents.description: Validates cross-border payment compliance including FEMA and purpose code requirements

intents.name: tokenize_card
intents.description: Tokenizes a card for secure storage and future transactions per RBI tokenization norms

intents.name: validate_card
intents.description: Validates card details including BIN, expiry, and CVV

intents.name: verify_bank_account
intents.description: Verifies a bank account using penny drop or account validation API

intents.name: process_emi
intents.description: Converts a transaction into EMI and validates eligibility and repayment schedule

intents.name: split_payment
intents.description: Splits a single payment across multiple beneficiaries or accounts

intents.name: initiate_ach
intents.description: Initiates an ACH transfer with validation of routing and account numbers

intents.name: process_swift
intents.description: Processes a SWIFT international wire transfer with compliance validation

intents.name: generate_payment_link
intents.description: Generates a secure payment link with amount, expiry, and beneficiary details

intents.name: settle_payment
intents.description: Settles a payment to the merchant or beneficiary after hold period

intents.name: reverse_payment
intents.description: Reverses a payment and restores the original balance

domains.description: Loan origination, credit assessment, risk scoring and loan lifecycle management

intents.name: approve_loan
intents.description: Approves a loan application based on creditworthiness and policy rules

intents.name: reject_loan
intents.description: Rejects a loan application with reason codes and adverse action notice

intents.name: calculate_credit_score
intents.description: Calculates a proprietary credit score using bureau data and alternative signals

intents.name: assess_borrower_risk
intents.description: Assesses overall borrower risk including income stability and repayment capacity

intents.name: determine_interest_rate
intents.description: Determines the applicable interest rate based on risk tier and market benchmarks

intents.name: predict_default
intents.description: Predicts probability of default for an active loan using payment behavior signals

intents.name: detect_synthetic_identity
intents.description: Detects synthetic or stolen identity used in loan applications

intents.name: verify_income
intents.description: Verifies declared income using bank statements, ITR, and payroll data

intents.name: evaluate_collateral
intents.description: Evaluates collateral value and lien eligibility for secured loans

intents.name: preapprove_loan
intents.description: Pre-approves a borrower for a loan offer based on soft credit pull

intents.name: recommend_loan
intents.description: Recommends the most suitable loan product for a borrower profile

intents.name: assess_sme_credit
intents.description: Assesses creditworthiness of small and medium enterprises using GST and bank data

intents.name: monitor_loan_risk
intents.description: Continuously monitors active loan portfolio for emerging risk signals

intents.name: trigger_loan_review
intents.description: Triggers a mandatory loan review based on covenant breach or early warning signals

intents.name: adjust_credit_limit
intents.description: Adjusts revolving credit limit based on utilization behavior and risk score changes

intents.name: disburse_loan
intents.description: Disburses approved loan amount to borrower account after documentation verification

intents.name: close_loan
intents.description: Closes a fully repaid loan and releases any lien or collateral

intents.name: restructure_loan
intents.description: Restructures a stressed loan with revised terms per RBI resolution framework

intents.name: process_loan_repayment
intents.description: Processes a loan repayment and updates principal, interest, and outstanding balance

intents.name: onboard_borrower
intents.description: Onboards a new borrower with KYC, bank account linkage, and mandate creation

intents.name: verify_employment
intents.description: Verifies employment status and income through employer or payslip validation

intents.name: generate_loan_statement
intents.description: Generates a loan account statement with repayment history and outstanding details

intents.name: assess_property
intents.description: Assesses property value and legal title for home loan or LAP underwriting

domains.description: Invoice processing, collections, reconciliation and payment automation

intents.name: extract_invoice

intents.name: validate_invoice

intents.description: Matches invoice to purchase order using 2-way or 3-way matching logic

intents.name: detect_duplicate_invoice
intents.description: Detects duplicate invoice submissions by vendor to prevent double payment

intents.name: approve_invoice
intents.description: Approves an invoice for payment after successful validation and matching

intents.description: Rejects an invoice with reason codes and notifies the vendor

intents.name: split_invoice

intents.name: verify_invoice_compliance
intents.description: Verifies invoice compliance with vendor contract terms and company policy

intents.name: audit_invoice
intents.description: Performs audit sampling on invoices for compliance and accuracy verification

intents.name: predict_payment_delay
intents.description: Predicts likelihood of customer payment delay using behavioral signals

intents.name: generate_invoice

intents.name: send_payment_reminder
intents.description: Sends automated payment reminders to customers based on due date proximity

intents.name: prioritize_collection
intents.description: Prioritizes collection efforts based on customer risk score and invoice age

intents.name: reconcile_receivable
intents.description: Reconciles received payments against outstanding invoices

intents.name: apply_payment
intents.description: Applies a customer payment to the correct invoice and updates the balance

intents.name: offer_discount
intents.description: Evaluates and offers early payment discount to accelerate receivables

intents.name: detect_overdue_risk
intents.description: Detects invoices at risk of becoming overdue based on payment behavior patterns

intents.name: automate_dunning
intents.description: Automates dunning process with escalating reminders and legal notices

intents.name: resolve_dispute
intents.description: Manages invoice dispute resolution workflow between buyer and supplier

intents.name: track_receivable_aging
intents.description: Tracks receivable aging buckets and generates aging analysis reports

intents.name: forecast_receivable
intents.description: Forecasts receivable collections for cash flow planning

intents.name: match_payment
intents.description: Matches incoming payments to open invoices using fuzzy matching

intents.name: identify_bad_debt
intents.description: Identifies invoices unlikely to be recovered and recommends write-off

intents.name: escalate_collection
intents.description: Escalates collection to legal or collection agency based on delinquency threshold

domains.description: Cash management, liquidity optimization, FX and capital planning

intents.name: monitor_bank_balance

intents.name: manage_borrowing

intents.name: detect_cash_movement

intents.description: Flags accounts exhibiting high-risk behaviors for enhanced due diligence

intents.name: verify_device

intents.name: monitor_dark_web

intents.description: Generates management reports with KPIs, variance analysis, and commentary

intents.name: validate_report
intents.description: Validates financial reports for accuracy, completeness, and regulatory compliance

intents.name: distribute_report
intents.description: Distributes reports to authorized stakeholders through secure channels

intents.name: archive_report
intents.description: Archives reports with tamper-proof storage for regulatory retention requirements

intents.name: generate_board_report
intents.description: Generates board-level reports with strategic metrics and risk summaries

intents.name: track_kpi
intents.description: Tracks key performance indicators against targets with trend analysis

domains.description: Enterprise risk — operational, credit, market risk and capital adequacy
domains.regulatoryRef: RBI Basel III Guidelines, ICAAP Requirements

intents.name: assess_operational_risk
intents.description: Assesses operational risks including process failures, system outages, and human errors

intents.name: assess_credit_risk
intents.description: Assesses overall credit risk exposure of the loan portfolio

intents.name: monitor_concentration_risk
intents.description: Monitors concentration risk across sectors, geographies, and single borrowers

intents.name: stress_test
intents.description: Runs stress test scenarios on portfolio to assess resilience under adverse conditions

intents.name: calculate_capital_adequacy
intents.description: Calculates capital adequacy ratios (CRAR) per Basel III requirements

intents.name: monitor_limit_breach
intents.description: Monitors risk limit utilization and triggers alerts on threshold breaches

intents.name: generate_risk_report
intents.description: Generates enterprise risk reports for board, regulator, and management

intents.name: assess_model_risk
intents.description: Assesses risk arising from the use of financial and AI models in decision-making

intents.name: track_risk_appetite
intents.description: Tracks risk appetite metrics against board-approved thresholds and tolerance levels

intents.name: escalate_risk
intents.description: Escalates risk events to appropriate authority level based on severity and policy
